## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Keep it brief (1-3 bullet points) -->

## Type

<!-- Check one -->

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] test: Test changes
- [ ] chore: Maintenance
- [ ] ci: CI/CD changes

## Test plan

<!-- How was this tested? -->

- [ ] Build passes (`cd react && npm run dev`)
- [ ] Server starts (`cd express && npm run dev`)
- [ ] Manual testing (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys (use .env)
- [ ] No leftover console.log
- [ ] Prepared statements used for all DB queries
- [ ] Error handling in place (status codes + .catch())
- [ ] Changes are <300 lines (or justified)
